@zerohedge: The core CPI miss was entirely due to an unexpected plunge in the car insurance index, which tumbled by 1.7% MoM (??), the biggest drop since covid. Most had expected a modest 0.1%-0.2% drop. Excluding this drop, core CPI would have printed hotter than estimates.
@DeItaone: ERDOGAN WARNS ISRAEL OVER REGIONAL ESCALATION

@Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan said Israel’s actions in Syria and Lebanon have wider consequences, including for Turkey’s security. He warned Ankara will not accept territorial “faits accomplis” and accused Israel of pursuing aggressive regional aims, saying the world will pay the price if it is not stopped. Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu rejected the comments and vowed continued military action against Iran and allied groups.: GEOPOLITICAL

@zerohedge: OpenAI in Talks to Lease 10 Gigawatt Ohio Data Center with Backing From Nvidia

@OpenAI is in advanced negotiations to lease a proposed 10 gigawatt data center campus on federal land in Ohio as part of a deal that could include financial backing from Nvidia, according to the Information. The campus under discussion would be among the biggest of its kind, with a total cost of at least $500 billion if fully built out based on today’s prices for chips, labor, power and other materials. OpenAI would control the equipment in the facility under a long-term lease and would be on the hook for payments once the project starts operations, with the first phase expected in 2028.: INSTITUTIONAL
